ruleDescriptions.PATH006: Classes matching '*Service' must be placed under '/domain/services/' (pure domain services).
ruleDescriptions.CQRS100: Command records must be nested in '*UseCase' under application/use-cases.
ruleDescriptions.CQRS101: Query records must be nested in '*UseCase' under application/use-cases.
ruleDescriptions.CQRS102: Use-case files must be '*UseCase.cs' and contain only record command/query members.
ruleDescriptions.CQRS103: Command/query records must not use custom inheritance; only approved request interfaces are allowed.
ruleDescriptions.IMM001: Command/query records must remain immutable: init-only properties and readonly fields only.
ruleDescriptions.DIP001: Constructor dependencies in target layers should depend on interfaces (DIP), except approved configuration-style concrete types.
ruleDescriptions.FLOW001: Workflow constructors may only depend on IDispatcher.
ruleDescriptions.FLOW002: Workflow methods are dispatch-only: they may only create command/query requests and call IDispatcher.Send(...).
ruleDescriptions.FLOW003: Handlers must not orchestrate by depending on dispatcher/mediator abstractions or dispatching nested requests.
ruleDescriptions.CTRL001: Controller constructors must stay in workflow/framework dependency scope.
